reason: This video contains only product marketing content for MediSimu laparoscopic simulators with promotional text overlays, product shots, and purchase information. No actual FLS task performance is visible to score.

frame_analyses.description: Static product shots of MediSimu laparoscopy simulator with promotional branding
Complete kit advertisement showing simulator components and pricing information
Final frames showing website contact information for purchasing

confidence_rationale: Video clearly contains only commercial/marketing content for laparoscopic simulator products with no actual task performance to evaluate
